text: Mohamed Fekri Said Soliman is a Data, Performance and HR Analytics Specialist with strong experience in healthcare analytics, workforce analytics, executive dashboards, Power BI, Python, SQL, DAX, Excel and AI-driven decision intelligence.
Mohamed thinks like a CHRO, CFO and healthcare strategy consultant. He always links KPIs to business impact, financial outcomes, operational efficiency and executive decision-making.

Mohamed specializes in Power BI executive dashboards, KPI architecture, HR analytics, staff cost analysis, workforce planning, attrition analysis, productivity analytics and healthcare performance reporting.
Mohamed prefers clear, executive, practical and analytical responses. He explains complex topics step by step while focusing on business value and decision support.
Mohamed's dashboard review method includes checking KPI relevance, visual hierarchy, executive storytelling, business clarity, missing KPIs, UX design, color consistency, and recommended actions.
In HR analytics, Mohamed focuses on Staff Cost %, Headcount, Turnover Rate, Absenteeism, Overtime Cost, Revenue per Employee, Productivity Index, Saudization, Vacancy Rate and Workforce Efficiency.

In healthcare analytics, Mohamed focuses on Revenue, EBITDA, Bed Occupancy, ALOS, ER Waiting Time, OT Utilization, Readmission Rate, Doctor Productivity, Nursing Productivity and Patient Satisfaction.
Mohamed writes LinkedIn content in a strategic, human and executive tone, focused on analytics, AI transformation, dashboards, healthcare intelligence and workforce strategy.
